all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
He trusted in the Lord God of Israel; so that after him was none like him among all the kings of Judah, nor any that were before him.
2 Kings 18:5
Quote of the Day
"To the Savior, we are never lost in the crowd. He knows how to reach us."
Elder Clement M. Matswagothata | 1 Apr 2026General Conference
